landing.rules.title: Rules
landing.rules.setup.title: Game Setup
landing.rules.setup.1: Before starting the game, place one neutral farmhouse on the empty board.
landing.rules.setup.2: After placing the neutral farmhouse, Blue always takes the first turn.
landing.rules.turns.title: Turn Order
landing.rules.turns.1: On your turn, place one farmhouse on any unclaimed farmland. You cannot place a farmhouse on already claimed farmland.
landing.rules.turns.2: A farmland area becomes yours when it is surrounded only by your farmhouses and does not connect to all four edges of the board at the same time.
landing.rules.turns.3: If you don't want to place a farmhouse, you may pass instead.
landing.rules.capture.title: Win by Capture
landing.rules.capture.1: If you completely surround an opponent's group of farmhouses on all four sides, they are captured.
landing.rules.capture.2: When a capture occurs, the game ends immediately and the capturing player wins.
landing.rules.end.title: Game Over
landing.rules.end.1: If both players pass consecutively, the game ends immediately.
landing.rules.end.2: When the game ends this way, Blue wins only if Blue's farmland exceeds Orange's by 3 or more tiles. Otherwise, Orange wins.
game.actions.confirmResetDescription: This will clear all farmhouses and start a new game. This cannot be undone.
game.navigation.confirmHomeDescription: You are being redirected to the homepage. Leave this game?
errors.pageNotFound: This page could not be found.
